chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P No. D-590 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26-06-2025 Miss Akhtiar Begum advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General a/w Inspector Nisar Ahmed Brohi, S.H.O P.S. Rehmatpur and S.I.P Mashooq Ali I.O of case. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa R. Junejo, advocate files vakalatnama for respondents No.5 to 8..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition has been filed by petitioners for quashment of F.I.R No.83/2025, registered at Police Station Gambat for offence U/S 365-B, 147, 148, 149 P.P.C. Learned counsel for the petitioners has filed amended title of petition under cover of his statement, which is taken on record. Today I.O of F.I.R No.83/2025 is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner Mst. Rabia. In her statement she has submitted that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Rano Khan by exercising her right of freewill. She has neither been abducted nor compelled to marry with petitioner No.2. She further submits that her brother Allah Dino (respondent No.5) has registered a false F.I.R against her husband. I.O further submits that after finalizing the report and completing the investigation, he will submit the report U/S 173 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate. Concerned Magistrate is directed to pass appropriate order in view of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by I.O. Instant petition stands disposed of in the terms stated as above. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law.
Instant petition stands disposed of in the terms stated as above. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Judge Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
